title.pt: Streams: lendo arquivos sem carregar tudo na memória
title.en: Streams: reading files without loading everything into memory
title.es: Streams: leyendo archivos sin cargar todo en memoria
title.de: Streams: Dateien lesen, ohne alles in den Speicher zu laden
title.it: Stream: leggere file senza caricare tutto in memoria
title.fr: Streams : lire des fichiers sans tout charger en mémoire

instructions.en: Implement `readStreamContent(path)` that reads a file using a readable stream (`fs.createReadStream`) and returns a Promise that resolves with the full file content as a string when the stream ends.
instructions.pt: Implemente `readStreamContent(path)` que lê um arquivo usando um readable stream (`fs.createReadStream`) e retorna uma Promise que resolve com o conteúdo completo do arquivo como string quando o stream terminar.
instructions.es: Implementa `readStreamContent(path)` que lea un archivo usando un readable stream (`fs.createReadStream`) y devuelva una Promise que se resuelva con el contenido completo del archivo como cadena cuando el stream termine.
instructions.de: Implementiere `readStreamContent(path)`, das eine Datei mit einem Readable Stream (`fs.createReadStream`) liest und ein Promise zurückgibt, das sich mit dem vollständigen Dateiinhalt als String auflöst, wenn der Stream endet.
instructions.it: Implementa `readStreamContent(path)` che legge un file usando un readable stream (`fs.createReadStream`) e restituisce una Promise che si risolve con il contenuto completo del file come stringa quando lo stream termina.
instructions.fr: Implémente `readStreamContent(path)` qui lit un fichier en utilisant un readable stream (`fs.createReadStream`) et retourne une Promise qui se résout avec le contenu complet du fichier sous forme de chaîne lorsque le stream se termine.

tests: const { writeFileSync } = require('fs'); writeFileSync('./test-stream.txt', 'streamed content'); const content = await streamFileToString('./test-stream.txt'); expect(content).toBe('streamed content');
const { writeFileSync } = require('fs'); writeFileSync('./test-stream2.txt', 'a'.repeat(5000)); const content2 = await streamFileToString('./test-stream2.txt'); expect(content2.length).toBe(5000);
